title: Create train_classical.py — XGBoost and Random Forest training
acceptance_criteria: Splits data by PARTICIPANT (e.g., train on P1-P3, test on P4) for generalization testing
Trains both XGBoost and Random Forest classifiers with hyperparameter tuning (GridSearchCV or RandomizedSearchCV)
Evaluates models on held-out participant test set
Prints test accuracy and F1-score for both models
Saves trained models to disk (e.g., .joblib or .pkl files)
Installs xgboost if not already available
